app.tagline: You send us something. We tell you if it's real, and why.
app.name: 237Sentinel

landing.heroSub: Paste a message or link, or add a photo, voice note, video or PDF. We check it and tell you plainly whether to trust it — in seconds.
landing.trustLine: Free for everyone. No account needed. English or French.
landing.orTelegram: Or forward it to our assistant on Telegram
landing.how1Body: A link, a message, an image, a voice note, a video, a document — whatever you received.
landing.how2Body: We read what it is really about, who it claims to be from, and what it asks you to do.
landing.how3Body: One of three: this is really them, we cannot confirm this, or this was altered — with what to do next.
landing.whyBody: In 2025, Cameroonians lost over 1 billion FCFA to online scams. Too often the fraud is caught after the money is gone. This puts the check in your hands, before you act.
landing.verifiedDesc: The sender matches an official channel we have on record.
landing.unconfirmedDesc: No proof it is fake, and no proof it is real. The most common — and most honest — answer.
landing.alteredDesc: We found strong signs the content was changed or made up.

check.title: Check something
check.subtitle: Paste text or a link, or drop a file. You don't need to say what kind — we work it out.
check.placeholder: Paste the message or link here…
check.dropHint: or drag a photo, voice note, video or PDF here
check.consent: You may keep this to help protect others (optional).
check.empty: Paste something or add a file first.
check.tooLarge: That file is too large (max 25 MB).
check.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

result.title: Result
result.technicalHint: For a curious reader — the raw signals behind this result.
result.notFound: We could not find that result.
result.civic: Before you share this, check the source. Reporting this protects other Cameroonians.

community.title: Community reports
community.subtitle: What other people are seeing right now. Anonymous. Regional.
community.empty: No reports yet. When people report scams, they show here.
community.bodyPlaceholder: Describe it in your own words. Do not include anyone's phone number or personal details.
community.posted: Thank you. Your report will appear after a quick review.
community.moderationNote: Reports are reviewed before they appear, to protect people's privacy.

organizations.title: Registered organizations
organizations.subtitle: Their real, official channels — so you can always check for yourself.
organizations.search: Search for a school, bank, ministry…

forOrg.title: When someone asks if it's really you, the answer should be yes.
forOrg.subtitle: Register your official channels. When a citizen checks a message that claims to be from you, we can confirm it's really you — and we tell you when someone is impersonating you.
forOrg.freeDesc: Your organization listed in the public registry with your verified channels, so anyone can check independently.
freeItems: Public profile with your official channels
Appear as "verified" when citizens check your messages
forOrg.paidDesc: Everything in Free, plus active protection and insight.
paidItems: Impersonation alerts when someone poses as you
See how often people check messages claiming to be you
API access to verify senders at scale

register.title: Register your organization
register.name: Organization name
register.channelsHint: Add the phone numbers, websites and handles you use with the public.
register.done: Your organization is registered and pending review.
register.apiKeyNote: Save this API key now — it is shown only once.

about.title: About 237Sentinel
about.body: 237Sentinel is a digital verification platform for Cameroon. Send it anything suspicious you receive online, and it tells you whether to trust it, and why — in plain language.
about.p1: We answer "is this what it claims to be?" — never "was a computer involved?". An AI-made shop flyer is fine; a forged decree is not.
about.p2: We do not overstate certainty. When the evidence is thin, we say "we cannot confirm this". That honesty is the point.
about.p3: Not being in our registry never means something is fake. It means we cannot confirm it — so check with the source.
about.limitsTitle: What we do not do yet
limits: We read English and French, not Pidgin or Camfranglais yet.
Field accuracy is lower than lab benchmarks — treat every result as guidance, not proof.

privacy.title: Privacy & data protection
privacy.body: We keep as little as possible. We never store your IP address, only a temporary hidden code to prevent abuse. We keep a short, redacted preview of what you send — never the full content — and we remove phone numbers and emails from anything shared publicly.
privacy.mediaBody: We do not keep the files you send unless you explicitly agree. When you do, they are deleted automatically after 30 days.
privacy.lawBody: This aligns with Law No. 2024/017 on Personal Data Protection.

apiDocs.title: API
apiDocs.body: 237Sentinel is open. The full interactive API documentation is served by the backend.

auth.signInHint: Paste the API key you received when registering.

admin.title: Admin
admin.tokenPrompt: Enter the admin token to continue.

footer.rights: A civic verification tool for Cameroon.
